label: CIS Safeguard 8.1
title: Establish and Maintain an Audit Log Management Process

prose.en: Establish and maintain a documented audit log management process that defines the enterprise's logging requirements. At a minimum, address the collection, review, and retention of audit logs for enterprise assets. Review and update documentation annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
A documented audit log management process is established and maintained that defines the enterprise's logging requirements.
At a minimum, the collection, review, and retention of audit logs are addressed for enterprise assets.
Documentation is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
